content: For the newbies out there

Brown WoDs (for Arc 1 only) 
BiS 

Frenzy - Adds Cursed Relics to the ingame Shops, purchasing a Cursed Relic refunds 15 Black Sigils  

Emerge - Can refund the shop (up to 3 times), each at 0 cost

Gluttony - Reject offers to place Orisons on your Cards to gain a boost in your Max Health (up to 2 times)

Contenders 

Aged - Grants 1000 Keyflare after completing a Battle

Whisper - Grants 50 Aliemus to the Ally with the least Aliemus after completing a Battle  

Epiphany - Grants 1000 Keyflare at the beginning of a Stage, grants 2 Arithmatecia for the first turn of a Boss Battle

Situational

Hope - Recover 5% of loss Health upon discovering a new Tile. After using an Emergency Gnosis, receive 100% Crit Damage + Chance

Vitality - Receive the additional Option to remove up to 3 Symptoms / States in Junctions

Exile - A Symptom / State Card can be sold in Shop instead of your Awakener's Command Cards
what cov should i run on kath?
I assume paradox but do I just run crit?

Yh
- 1 - Crit Rate > Crit Damage
- 2 - Crit Rate > Crit Damage
- 3 - Crit Rate > Crit Damage
- 4 - Keyflare
- 5 - Keyflare = Damage Amplication
- 6 - Damage Amplication
rate over dmg?
Yh a failed Crit Hit can be very fatal for Kath as she typically builds up for one really big strike
If it doesn't land a Crit, can be hard to come back for you
so minimum crit rate max crit dmg just hit the crit i see

Hi, a bit of a long one but could I ask for opinions on my potential pull plans? I've just finished ch7 + hard ch3 and haven't used any limited pulls yet
65k silver, 38 luminous cores, 290 pure cores, one enlightenment item, one wheel item, three standard enlightenment items

Non-standard characters I have: Thais e0, Salvador e0, Daffodil e0

Salvador route
- pull xu e0 (stat-stick support, d-tide later)
- pull horla e0
- pull Thais wheel
E2 Salvador with enlightenment items

Castor route
- pull castor e1, e3 him with items (one less copy if shafted on luck)
- pull horla e0
- pull Thais wheel (two pity max since ended on character pull in ultra banner)
Make an e2 Jenkins with items

Patience route
- pull horla e0 (or e1)
- pull until castor or his wheel (or skip)
- pull Thais wheel (or skip)
Save enlightenment items and remaining pulls for a DPS banner

This would be more helpful for you in the long run, but harsh short term 

I'd personally recommend

- Select Castor / Clementine on the Ultra Chronos Mandate (One In a Million) Banner, use the free Pull to stack the Pity
- Select Thais in the following Realm Change to Caro, aim to get at minimum to get a base Copy of  her WoD.
- L Even better if you get a Copy or two of Thais herself to obtain E2 (Exalt reduces the Cost of the duplicated Cards by 2)
- Aim to raise Horla to E1 (Psalms can now apply Vulnerable / Weakness) immediately
- L Optional, obtain a base Copy of her WoD
- Save for DPS Character from upcoming Triple Rerun Banners, ideally Kathigu-Ra / Mouchette / Helot: Catena / Corposant / Pollux

Yeah, One In A Million is difficult to reasonably target Awakeners / WoDs as the Banner has both Awakeners / WoDs and the Rate Ups share guarantees with eachother unless you obtain 2 of one first which would then make the other guaranteed
So best case Scenario, you obtain the targeted Awakener / WoD within 90 Pulls, worse case Scenario you're down 180 Pulls
It's not worth all the Silver
Yh np man
I'd also consider using your Standard Pulls on obtaining more Characters
You ideally want to build 5 Teams, so 16 - 20 Characters

Hello, I want to get Horla E1, is it better to pull the one in a million banner or the triple rerun one? Dont have her and her wheel

Breakpoints

- E2 (Exalt generates Cards with Advanced Orisons, creates Golden Paintings Relics from 2-Cost Skill)
- E3 (Consuming Creativity grants 50 Aliemus, can cast Exalt one additional time in this Turn)
- OE (Obtain 1 Stack of Fantasia on Cast, Discover 1 additional Card every Cast)
If you're targeting Horla, I'd recommend pulling for her in the upcoming Triple Rerun Banner over Chronos Mandate since you can target Horla & her WoD separately rather than together
I think that he can pull until having at least 1 copy of her and her wheel on the million, and then can complete it with the rerun, isnt it better that way?

I mean, he could. But like, the Pity is 60 for both Horla and her WoD, which also means that you can obtain unwanted Awakeners / WoDs while doing so and there's no guarantee that you would obtain one and the other. It's better if they're seperate imo

If I'm planning to pull for thais wheel (have e0 thais) on million banner, should I get one wheel/character from ultra to prevent wheel dupes?

Outcomes:
Ultra unit -> Thais wheel, EZ game stop here
Ultra unit -> Thais E1 -> Thais wheel forced
Ultra wheel -> Thais wheel, can force E1 Thais
Ultra wheel -> Thais E1 -> Thais E2 -> Thais wheel forced
Ultra wheel -> Thais E1 -> Thais wheel

So essentially you eliminate the chance of dupe thais wheel and instead get one copy of the utlra unit or their wheel?
Thais E2 is good, so ultra doesn't really matter
Go for ultra if you want an ultra char, skip ultra if you don't
dupe thais wheel is good anyway lol
probably the best wheel to dupe
u will literally always use it
Ok so thais wheel dupe is better than first copy of ultra unit/wheel? Fair enough
Not necessarily
But it doesn't change anything about the pull plan
just saying its not the worst outcome
Wether you get an ultra unit or wheel, it's still 50/50 between getting thais wheel or a dupe
Nothing changes
u can get e1 thais wheel and its fine
I don't understand what you mean by nothing changes, I guess you're saying the chance of duping thais wheel is worth it to save the pulls "wasted" on castor/clem e0 or their wheels?
you want to e3 thais wheel anyways, its the best in the game
Because you can eliminate the chance for thais wheel dupe by pulling one pity on ultra

So essentially
Thais wheel first copy > Thais unit dupes > thais wheel dupes > castor/clem unit-wheel 50/50
I assume if you could guarantee the unit the unit might win over thais wheel dupes but the first copy of their wheels are inferior to thais wheel dupe

as a new player should I pull on the one in a million banner before it goes away? Does the pity carry over?

Pity carries over between Banners of the same Type. For example

- One In A Million (for all currently released Characters / WoDs for each individual Realm) 
- L can be found under Chronos Mandate 
- Single Target (for New Characters / WoDs) and Triple Rerun for (old Characters / WoDs)
- L can be found Character & WoD Event Awakening  respectively
- Realm Study / Research (for Standard Characters) and Wheels of Rotation (for Standard WoDs)
- L can be found under Standard Character & WoD Event Awakening respectively

- L_ Additional Foot Notes (for Chronos Mandate) 
- The Character you select from Chronos Mandate will be locked for Rate Up alongside their Signature WoD until the current Realm changes 
- You may pull both Characters & WoDs from the Chronos Mandate Banner 
- Pity for Rate Up Character & WoD is 60 Pulls
- Pulling either the same Rate Up Character / WoD twice will make whichever Rate Up Character / WoD that you have yet to pull guaranteed
- L This would make the minimum Pity for both Awakener & WoD a total of 90 Pulls or at worst 180 Pulls

- L_ Additional Foot Notes for Character / WoD Event Awakening
- Pity for Rate Up Character is 90 Pulls
- Pity for Rate Up WoD is 60 Pulls

- L_ Additional Foot Notes for Standard Character / WoD Event Awakening
- Pity for Rate Up Character is 90 Pulls
- Pity for Rate Up WoD is 60 Pulls
- It is also possible to obtain Limited Characters / WoDs that released during Arc 1 from their relevant Standard Realm Banners
